title: Coppa Italia: the official line-ups for Como vs. Inter
fullText: Coppa Italia: the official line-ups for Como vs. InterCOMO (4-2-3-1): 1 Butez; 28 Smolčić, 14 Ramón, 34 D.Carlos, 3 Valle; 23 Perrone, 8 S.Roberto; 31 Vojvoda, 33 Da Cunha, 6 Caqueret; 10 Paz. Substitutes: 21 Törnqvist, 22 Vigorito, 44 Čavlina, 5 Goldaniga, 7 Morata, 11 Douvikas, 15 Lahdo, 17 Rodriguez, 18 Moreno, 19 Kühn, 20 Baturina, 38 Diao, 77 Van der Brempt. Coach: Cesc FabregasAdvertisementINTER (3-5-1-1): 13 J. Martínez; 31 Bisseck, 15 Acerbi, 95 Bastoni; 36 Darmian, 16 Frattesi, 20 Calhanoglu, 8 Sucic, 30 Carlos Augusto; 17 Diouf; 94 Esposito. Substitutes: 1 Sommer, 12 Di Gennaro, 2 Dumfries, 6 De Vrij, 7 Zielinski, 9 Thuram, 11 Luis Henrique, 22 Mkhitaryan, 23 Barella, 25 Akanji, 32 Dimarco, 53 Lavelli. Coach: Cristian ChivuReferee: Di Bello Assistant: Peretti - Colarossi Fourth official: Zufferli VAR: Mazzoleni AVAR: MarescaSUSPENDED Como: - Inter: -ONE BOOKING AWAY FROM SUSPENSION Como: Diego Carlos, Kühn, Morata, Paz, Ramón J., Roberto S., Van der Brempt Inter: Esposito, Kamate, Sucic
